Logger log;\n\n    // the \"__\" (double underscore) string is not allowed for topology names, so it's safe to use to indicate\n    // that it's not a named topology\n    public static final String UNNAMED_TOPOLOGY = \"__UNNAMED_TOPOLOGY__\";\n    private static final Pattern EMPTY_ZERO_LENGTH_PATTERN = Pattern.compile(\"\");\n\n    private final StreamsConfig config;\n    private final ProcessingMode processingMode;\n    private final TopologyVersion version;\n    private final TaskExecutionMetadata taskExecutionMetadata;\n    private final Set<String> pausedTopologies;\n\n    private final ConcurrentNavigableMap<String, InternalTopologyBuilder> builders; // Keep sorted by topology name for readability\n    private final List<TopologyLifecycleObserver> lifecycleObservers = new ArrayList<>();\n\n    private ProcessorTopology globalTopology;\n    private final Map<String, StateStore> globalStateStores = new HashMap<>();\n    private final Set<String> allInputTopics = new HashSet<>();\n    private final Map<String, Long> threadVersions = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();\n\n    public static class TopologyVersion {\n        public AtomicLong topologyVersion = new AtomicLong(0L); // the local topology version\n        public ReentrantLock topologyLock = new ReentrantLock();\n        public Condition topologyCV = topologyLock.newCondition();\n        public List<TopologyVersionListener> activeTopologyUpdateListeners = new LinkedList<>();\n    }\n\n    public static class TopologyVersionListener {\n        final long topologyVersion; // the (minimum) version to wait for these threads to cross\n        final KafkaFutureImpl<Void> future; // the future waiting on all threads to be updated\n\n        public TopologyVersionListener(final long topologyVersion, final KafkaFutureImpl<Void> future) {\n            this.topologyVersion = topologyVersion;\n            this.future = future;\n        }\n    }\n\n    public interface TopologyLifecycleObserver {\n        void onTopologyChange(long newVersion, Set<String> activeTopologies);\n    }\n\n    public TopologyMetadata(final InternalTopologyBuilder builder,\n                            final StreamsConfig config) {\n        this.version = new TopologyVersion();\n        this.processingMode = StreamsConfigUtils.processingMode(config);\n        this.config = config;\n        this.log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(getClass());\n        this.pausedTopologies = ConcurrentHashMap.newKeySet();\n\n        builders = new ConcurrentSkipListMap<>();\n        if (builder.hasNamedTopology()) {\n            builders.put(builder.topologyName(), builder);\n        } else {\n            builders.put(UNNAMED_TOPOLOGY, builder);\n        }\n        this.taskExecutionMetadata = new TaskExecutionMetadata(builders.keySet(), pausedTopologies, processingMode);\n    }\n\n    public TopologyMetadata(final ConcurrentNavigableMap<String, InternalTopologyBuilder> builders,\n                            final StreamsConfig config) {\n        this.version = new TopologyVersion();\n        this.processingMode = StreamsConfigUtils.processingMode(config);\n        this.config = config;\n        this.log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(getClass());\n        this.pausedTopologies = ConcurrentHashMap.newKeySet();\n\n        this.builders = builders;\n        if (builders.isEmpty()) {\n            log.info(\"Created an empty KafkaStreams app with no topology\");\n        }\n        this.taskExecutionMetadata = new TaskExecutionMetadata(builders.keySet(), pausedTopologies, processingMode);\n    }\n\n    // Need to (re)set the log here to pick up the `processId` part of the clientId in the prefix\n    public void setLog(final LogContext logContext) {\n        log = logContext.logger(getClass());\n    }\n    \n    public ProcessingMode processingMode() {\n        return processingMode;\n    }\n\n    public long topologyVersion() {\n        return version.topologyVersion.get();\n    }\n\n    private void lock() {\n        version.topologyLock.lock();\n    }\n\n    private void unlock() {\n        version.topologyLock.unlock();\n    }\n\n    public Collection<String> sourceTopicsForTopology(final String name) {\n        return builders.get(name).fullSourceTopicNames();\n    }\n\n    public boolean needsUpdate(final String threadName) {\n        return threadVersions.get(threadName) < topologyVersion();\n    }\n\n    public void registerThread(final String threadName) {\n        threadVersions.put(threadName, 0L);\n    }\n\n    public void unregisterThread(final String threadName) {\n        threadVersions.remove(threadName);\n        maybeNotifyTopologyVersionListeners();\n    }\n\n    public TaskExecutionMetadata taskExecutionMetadata() {\n        return taskExecutionMetadata;\n    }\n\n    public void executeTopologyUpdatesAndBumpThreadVersion(final Consumer<Set<String>> handleTopologyAdditions,\n                                                           final Consumer<Set<String>> handleTopologyRemovals) {\n        try {\n            version.topologyLock.lock();\n            final long latestTopologyVersion = topologyVersion();\n            handleTopologyAdditions.accept(namedTopologiesView());\n            handleTopologyRemovals.accept(namedTopologiesView());\n            threadVersions.put(Thread.currentThread().getName(), latestTopologyVersion);\n        } finally {\n            version.topologyLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public void maybeNotifyTopologyVersionListeners() {\n        try {\n            lock();\n            final long minThreadVersion = minimumThreadVersion();\n            final Iterator<TopologyVersionListener> iterator = version.activeTopologyUpdateListeners.listIterator();\n            TopologyVersionListener topologyVersionListener;\n            while (iterator.hasNext()) {\n                topologyVersionListener = iterator.next();\n                final long topologyVersionWaitersVersion = topologyVersionListener.topologyVersion;\n                if (minThreadVersion >= topologyVersionWaitersVersion) {\n                    topologyVersionListener.future.complete(null);\n                    iterator.remove();\n                    log.info(\"All threads are now on topology version {}\", topologyVersionListener.topologyVersion);\n                }\n            }\n        } finally {\n            unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Return the minimum version across all live threads, or Long.MAX_VALUE if there are no threads running\n    private long minimumThreadVersion() {\n        final Optional<Long> minVersion = threadVersions.values().stream().min(Long::compare);\n        return minVersion.orElse(Long.MAX_VALUE);\n    }\n\n    public void wakeupThreads() {\n        try {\n            lock();\n            version.topologyCV.signalAll();\n        } finally {\n            unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public void registerLifecycleObserver(final TopologyLifecycleObserver observer) {\n        lock();\n        try {\n            lifecycleObservers.add(observer);\n        } finally {\n            unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    private void notifyLifecycleObservers() {\n        final long currentVersion = version.topologyVersion.get();\n        final Set<String> activeTopologies = namedTopologiesView();\n        for (final TopologyLifecycleObserver observer : lifecycleObservers) {\n            try {\n                observer.onTopologyChange(currentVersion, activeTopologies);\n            } catch (final Exception e) {\n                log.warn(\"Topology lifecycle observer threw exception\", e);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    public boolean isTaskTopologyStale(final TaskId taskId) {\n        lock();\n        try {\n            final String topologyName = taskId.topologyName();\n            if (topologyName != null) {\n                return !builders.containsKey(topologyName);\n            }\n            return false;\n        } finally {\n            unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public void maybeWaitForNonEmptyTopology(final Supplier<StreamThread.State> threadState) {\n        if (isEmpty() && threadState.get().isAlive()) {\n            try {\n                lock();\n                while (isEmpty() && threadState.get().isAlive()) {\n                    try {\n                        log.debug(\"Detected that the topology is currently empty, waiting for something to process\");\n                        version.topologyCV.await();\n                    } catch (final InterruptedException e) {\n                        log.error(\"StreamThread was interrupted while waiting on empty topology\", e);\n                    }\n                }\n            } finally {\n                unlock();\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Adds the topology and registers a future that listens for all threads on the older version to see the update\n     */\n    public void registerAndBuildNewTopology(final KafkaFutureImpl<Void> future, final InternalTopologyBuilder newTopologyBuilder) {\n        try {\n            lock();\n            buildAndVerifyTopology(newTopologyBuilder);\n            log.info(\"New NamedTopology {} passed validation and will be added, old topology version is {}\", newTopologyBuilder.topologyName(), version.topologyVersion.get());\n            version.topologyVersion.incrementAndGet();\n            version.activeTopologyUpdateListeners.add(new TopologyVersionListener(topologyVersion(), future));\n            builders.put(newTopologyBuilder.topologyName(), newTopologyBuilder);\n            wakeupThreads();\n            notifyLifecycleObservers();\n            log.info(\"Added NamedTopology {} and updated topology version to {}\", newTopologyBuilder.topologyName(), version.topologyVersion.get());\n        } catch (final Throwable throwable) {\n            log.error(\"Failed to add NamedTopology {}, please retry the operation.\", newTopologyBuilder.topologyName());\n            future.completeExceptionally(throwable);\n        } finally {\n            unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Pauses a topology by name\n     * @param topologyName Name of the topology to pause\n     */\n    public void pauseTopology(final String topologyName) {\n        pausedTopologies.add(topologyName);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Checks if a given topology is paused.\n     * @param topologyName If null, assume that we are checking the `UNNAMED_TOPOLOGY`.\n     * @return A boolean indicating if the topology is paused.\n     */\n    public boolean isPaused(final String topologyName) {\n        return pausedTopologies.contains(getTopologyNameOrElseUnnamed(topologyName));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Resumes a topology by name\n     * @param topologyName Name of the topology to resume\n     */\n    public void resumeTopology(final String topologyName) {\n        pausedTopologies.remove(topologyName);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Removes the topology and registers a future that listens for all threads on the older version to see the update\n     */\n    public KafkaFuture<Void> unregisterTopology(final KafkaFutureImpl<Void> removeTopologyFuture,\n                                                final String topologyName) {\n        try {\n            lock();\n            log.info(\"Beginning removal of NamedTopology {}, old topology version is {}\", topologyName, version.topologyVersion.get());\n            version.topologyVersion.incrementAndGet();\n            version.activeTopologyUpdateListeners.add(new TopologyVersionListener(topologyVersion(), removeTopologyFuture));\n            final InternalTopologyBuilder removedBuilder = builders.remove(topologyName);\n            removedBuilder.fullSourceTopicNames().forEach(allInputTopics::remove);\n            removedBuilder.allSourcePatternStrings().forEach(allInputTopics::remove);\n            notifyLifecycleObservers();\n            log.info(\"Finished removing NamedTopology {}, topology version was updated to {}\", topologyName, version.topologyVersion.get());\n        } catch (final Throwable throwable) {\n            log.error(\"Failed to remove NamedTopology {}, please retry.\", topologyName);\n            removeTopologyFuture.completeExceptionally(throwable);\n        } finally {\n            unlock();\n        }\n        return removeTopologyFuture;\n    }\n\n    public TaskConfig taskConfig(final TaskId taskId) {\n        final InternalTopologyBuilder builder = lookupBuilderForTask(taskId);\n        return builder.topologyConfigs().getTaskConfig();\n    }\n\n    public void buildAndRewriteTopology() {\n        applyToEachBuilder(this::buildAndVerifyTopology);\n    }\n\n    private void buildAndVerifyTopology(final InternalTopologyBuilder builder) {\n        builder.rewriteTopology(config);\n        builder.buildTopology();\n\n        final Set<String> allInputTopicsCopy = new HashSet<>(allInputTopics);\n\n        // As we go, check each topology for overlap in the set of input topics/patterns\n        final int numInputTopics = allInputTopicsCopy.size();\n        final List<String> inputTopics = builder.fullSourceTopicNames();\n        final Collection<String> inputPatterns = builder.allSourcePatternStrings();\n\n        final Set<String> newInputTopics = new HashSet<>(inputTopics);\n        newInputTopics.addAll(inputPatterns);\n\n        final int numNewInputTopics = newInputTopics.size();\n        allInputTopicsCopy.addAll(newInputTopics);\n\n        if (allInputTopicsCopy.size() != numInputTopics + numNewInputTopics) {\n            inputTopics.retainAll(allInputTopicsCopy);\n            inputPatterns.retainAll(allInputTopicsCopy);\n            log.error(\"Tried to add the NamedTopology {} but it had overlap with other input topics {} or patterns {}\",\n                      builder.topologyName(), inputTopics, inputPatterns);\n            throw new TopologyException(\"Named Topologies may not subscribe to the same input topics or patterns\");\n        }\n\n        final ProcessorTopology globalTopology = builder.buildGlobalStateTopology();\n        if (globalTopology != null) {\n            if (builder.topologyName() != null) {\n                throw new IllegalStateException(\"Global state stores are not supported with Named Topologies\");\n            } else if (this.globalTopology != null) {\n                throw new TopologyException(\"Topology builder had global state, but global topology has already been set\");\n            } else {\n                this.globalTopology = globalTopology;\n                globalStateStores.putAll(builder.globalStateStores());\n            }\n        }\n        allInputTopics.addAll(newInputTopics);\n    }\n\n    public int numStreamThreads(final StreamsConfig config) {\n        final int configuredNumStreamThreads = config.getInt(StreamsConfig.NUM_STREAM_THREADS_CONFIG);\n\n        // If there are named topologies but some are empty, this indicates a bug in user code\n        if (hasNamedTopologies()) {\n            if (hasNoLocalTopology()) {\n                log.error(\"Detected a named topology with no input topics, a named topology may not be empty.\");\n                throw new TopologyException(\"Topology has no stream threads and no global threads, \" +\n                                                \"must subscribe to at least one source topic or pattern.\");\n            }\n        } else {\n            // If both the global and non-global topologies are empty, this indicates a bug in user code\n            if (hasNoLocalTopology() && !hasGlobalTopology()) {\n                log.error(\"Topology with no input topics will create no stream threads and no global thread.\");\n                throw new TopologyException(\"Topology has no stream threads and no global threads, \" +\n                                                \"must subscribe to at least one source topic or global table.\");\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Lastly we check for an empty non-global topology and override the threads to zero if set otherwise\n        if (configuredNumStreamThreads != 0 && hasNoLocalTopology()) {\n            log.info(\"Overriding number of StreamThreads to zero for global-only topology\");\n            return 0;\n        }\n\n        return configuredNumStreamThreads;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @return true iff the app is using named topologies, or was started up with no topology at all\n     */\n    public boolean hasNamedTopologies() {\n        return !builders.containsKey(UNNAMED_TOPOLOGY);\n    }\n\n    public Set<String> namedTopologiesView() {\n        return hasNamedTopologies() ? Collections.unmodifiableSet(builders.keySet()) : emptySet();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @return true iff any of the topologies have a global topology\n     */\n    public boolean hasGlobalTopology() {\n        return evaluateConditionIsTrueForAnyBuilders(InternalTopologyBuilder::hasGlobalStores);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @return true iff any of the topologies have no local (aka non-global) topology\n     */\n    public boolean hasNoLocalTopology() {\n        return evaluateConditionIsTrueForAnyBuilders(InternalTopologyBuilder::hasNoLocalTopology);\n    }\n\n    public boolean hasPersistentStores() {\n        // If the app is using named topologies, there may not be any persistent state when it first starts up\n        // but a new NamedTopology may introduce it later, so we must return true\n        if (hasNamedTopologies()) {\n            return true;\n        }\n        return evaluateConditionIsTrueForAnyBuilders(InternalTopologyBuilder::hasPersistentStores);\n    }\n\n    public boolean hasStore(final String name) {\n        return evaluateConditionIsTrueForAnyBuilders(b -> b.hasStore(name));\n    }\n\n    public boolean hasOffsetResetOverrides() {\n        // Return true if using named topologies, as there may be named topologies added later which do have overrides\n        return hasNamedTopologies() || evaluateConditionIsTrueForAnyBuilders(InternalTopologyBuilder::hasOffsetResetOverrides);\n    }\n\n    public Optional<AutoOffsetResetStrategy> offsetResetStrategy(final String topic) {\n        for (final InternalTopologyBuilder builder : builders.values()) {\n            if (builder.containsTopic(topic)) {\n                return Optional.ofNullable(builder.offsetResetStrategy(topic));\n            }\n        }\n        log.warn(\"Unable to look up offset reset strategy for topic {} \" +\n            \"as this topic does not appear in the sources of any of the current topologies: {}\\n \" +\n                \"This may be due to natural race condition when removing a topology but it should not \" +\n                \"persist or appear frequently.\",\n            topic, namedTopologiesView()\n        );\n        // returning `null` for an Optional return type triggers spotbugs\n        // we added an exception for NP_OPTIONAL_RETURN_NULL for this method\n        // when we remove NamedTopologies, we can remove this exception\n        return null;\n    }\n\n\n    public Collection<String> fullSourceTopicNamesForTopology(final String topologyName) {\n        Objects.requireNonNull(topologyName, \"topology name must not be null\");\n        return lookupBuilderForNamedTopology(topologyName).fullSourceTopicNames();\n    }\n\n    public Collection<String> allFullSourceTopicNames() {\n        final List<String> sourceTopics = new ArrayList<>();\n        applyToEachBuilder(b -> sourceTopics.addAll(b.fullSourceTopicNames()));\n        return sourceTopics;\n    }\n\n    Pattern sourceTopicPattern() {\n        final StringBuilder patternBuilder = new StringBuilder();\n\n        applyToEachBuilder(b -> {\n            final String patternString = b.sourceTopicPatternString();\n            if (!patternString.isEmpty()) {\n                patternBuilder.append(patternString).append(\"|\");\n            }\n        });\n\n        if (patternBuilder.length() > 0) {\n            patternBuilder.setLength(patternBuilder.length() - 1);\n            return Pattern.compile(patternBuilder.toString());\n        } else {\n            return EMPTY_ZERO_LENGTH_PATTERN;\n        }\n    }\n\n    public boolean usesPatternSubscription() {\n        return evaluateConditionIsTrueForAnyBuilders(InternalTopologyBuilder::usesPatternSubscription);\n    }\n\n    // Can be empty if app is started up with no Named Topologies, in order to add them on later\n    public boolean isEmpty() {\n        return builders.isEmpty();\n    }\n\n    public String topologyDescriptionString() {\n        if (isEmpty()) {\n            return \"\";\n        }\n        final StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();\n\n        applyToEachBuilder(b -> sb.append(b.describe().toString()));\n\n        return sb.toString();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @return the {@link ProcessorTopology subtopology} built for this task, guaranteed to be non-null\n     *\n     * @throws UnknownTopologyException  if the task is from a named topology that this client isn't aware of\n     */\n    public ProcessorTopology buildSubtopology(final TaskId task) {\n        final InternalTopologyBuilder builder = lookupBuilderForTask(task);\n        return state stores are not supported with Named Topologies\");\n        }\n        return globalTopology;\n    }\n\n    public Map<String, StateStore> globalStateStores() {\n        return  return stateStoreNameToSourceTopics;\n    }\n\n    public String storeForChangelogTopic(final String topicName) {\n        for (final InternalTopologyBuilder builder : builders.values()) {\n      for (final InternalTopologyBuilder builder : builders.values()) {\n            if (condition.apply(builder)) {\n                return true;\n            }\n        }\n        return false;\n function.accept(builder);\n        }\n    }\n\n    public static class Subtopology implements Comparable<Subtopology> {\n        final int nodeGroupId;\n        final String namedTopology;\n\n       public boolean equals(final Object o) {\n            if (this == o) {\n                return true;\n            }\n            if (o == null || getClass() != o.getClass()) {\n                return false;\n            }\n            final Subtopology that = (Subtopology) o;\n            return nodeGroupId == that.nodeGroupId &&\n                    Objects.equals(namedTopology, that.namedTopology);\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public int hashCode() {\n            return Objects.hash(nodeGroupId, namedTopology);\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public int       recordMetrics(endTimeMs, totalTime, totalWaitTime);\n   214→   214→        }\n   215→   215→\n   216→   216→        private void performActionsOnTasks() {\n   217→   217→     } finally {\n   233→   233→                tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n   234→   234→            }\n   235→   235→        }\n   236→   236→\n   237→   237→        private void resumeTasks() {\n log.info((task.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\")\n   580→   580→                + \" task \" + task.id() + \" was removed from the paused tasks.\");\n   581→   581→            future.complete(new RemovedTaskResult(task));\n   582→   582→            return true;\n   583→   583→        }\n   584→   584→\n   585→   585→        private void preparePausedTaskForRemoval(final Task task,\n   586→   586→                                                 final StandbyUpdateListener.SuspendReason suspendReason) {\n   587→   587→            final Collection<TopicPartition> changelogPartitions = task.changelogPartitions();\n   588→   588→            changelogReader.unregister(changelogPartitions, suspendReason);\n   589→   589→        }\n   590→   590→\n   591→   591→        private boolean removeRestoredTask(final TaskId taskId, final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future) {\n   592→   592→            restoredActiveTasksLock.lock();\n   593→   593→            try {\n   594→   594→                final Iterator<StreamTask> iterator = restoredActiveTasks.iterator();\n   595→   595→                while (iterator.hasNext()) {\n   596→   596→                    final StreamTask restoredTask = iterator.next();\n   597→   597→                    if (restoredTask.id().equals(taskId)) {\n   598→   598→                        iterator.remove();\n   599→   599→                        log.info((restoredTask.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\")\n   600→   600→                            + \" task \" + restoredTask.id() + \" was removed from the restored tasks.\");\n   601→   601→                        future.complete(new RemovedTaskResult(restoredTask));\n   602→   602→                        return true;\n   603→   603→                    }\n   604→   604→                }\n   605→   605→                return false;\n   606→   606→            } finally {\n   607→   607→                restoredActiveTasksLock.unlock();\n   608→   608→            }\n   609→   609→        }\n   610→   610→\n   611→   611→        private boolean removeFailedTask(final TaskId taskId, final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future) {\n   612→   612→            exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.lock();\n   613→   613→            try {\n   614→   614→                final Iterator<ExceptionAndTask> iterator = exceptionsAndFailedTasks.iterator();\n   615→   615→                while (iterator.hasNext()) {\n   616→   616→                    final ExceptionAndTask exceptionAndTask = iterator.next();\n   617→   617→                    final Task failedTask = exceptionAndTask.task();\n   618→   618→                    if (failedTask.id().equals(taskId)) {\n   619→   619→                        iterator.remove();\n   620→   620→                        log.info((failedTask.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\")\n   621→   621→                            + \" task \" + failedTask.id() + \" was removed from the failed tasks.\");\n   622→   622→                        future.complete(new RemovedTaskResult(failedTask, exceptionAndTask.exception()));\n   623→   623→                        return true;\n   624→   624→                    }\n   625→   625→                }\n   626→   626→                return false;\n   627→   627→            } finally {\n   628→   628→                exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.unlock();\n   629→   629→            }\n   630→   630→        }\n   631→   631→\n   632→   632→        private void pauseTask(final Task task) {\n   633→   633→            final TaskId taskId = task.id();\n   634→   634→            // do not need to unregister changelog partitions for paused tasks\n   635→   635→            try {\n   636→   636→                measureCheckpointLatency(() -> task.maybeCheckpoint(true));\n   637→   637→                pausedTasks.put(taskId, task);\n   638→   638→                updatingTasks.remove(taskId);\n   639→   639→                if (task.isActive()) {\n   640→   640→                    transitToUpdateStandbysIfOnlyStandbysLeft();\n   641→   641→                }\n   642→   642→                log.info((task.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\")\n   643→   643→                    + \" task \" + task.id() + \" was paused from the updating tasks and added to the paused tasks.\");\n   644→   644→\n   645→   645→            } catch (final StreamsException streamsException) {\n   646→   646→                handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(streamsException, taskId);\n   647→   647→            }\n   648→   648→        }\n   649→   649→\n   650→   650→        private void resumeTask(final Task task) {\n   651→   651→            final TaskId taskId = task.id();\n   652→   652→            updatingTasks.put(taskId, task);\n   653→   653→            pausedTasks.remove(taskId);\n   654→   654→\n   655→   655→            if (task.isActive()) {\n   656→   656→                log.info(\"Stateful active task \" + task.id() + \" was resumed to the updating tasks of the state updater\");\n   657→   657→                changelogReader.enforceRestoreActive();\n   658→   658→            } else {\n   659→   659→                log.info(\"Standby task \" + task.id() + \" was resumed to the updating tasks of the state updater\");\n   660→   660→                if (updatingTasks.size() == 1) {\n   661→   661→                    changelogReader.transitToUpdateStandby();\n   662→   662→                }\n   663→   663→            }\n   664→   664→        }\n   665→   665→\n   666→   666→        private boolean isStateless(final Task task) {\n   667→   667→            return task.changelogPartitions().isEmpty() && task.isActive();\n   668→   668→        }\n   669→   669→\n   670→   670→        private void maybeCompleteRestoration(final StreamTask task,\n   671→   671→                                              final Set<TopicPartition> restoredChangelogs) {\n   672→   672→            final Collection<TopicPartition> changelogPartitions = task.changelogPartitions();\n   673→   673→            if (restoredChangelogs.containsAll(changelogPartitions)) {\n   674→   674→                try {\n   675→   675→                    if (topologyMetadata.topologyVersion() > restorationStartTopologyVersion) {\n   676→   676→                        log.info(\"Topology version changed during restoration of task {}, re-queuing\", task.id());\n   677→   677→                        changelogReader.unregister(changelogPartitions);\n   678→   678→                        requeueTaskForRestoration(task);\n   679→   679→                        return;\n   680→   680→                    }\n   681→   681→                    measureCheckpointLatency(() -> task.maybeCheckpoint(true));\n   682→   682→                    changelogReader.unregister(changelogPartitions);\n   683→   683→                    addToRestoredTasks(task);\n   684→   684→                    log.info(\"Stateful active task \" + task.id() + \" completed restoration\");\n   685→   685→                    transitToUpdateStandbysIfOnlyStandbysLeft();\n   686→   686→                } catch (final StreamsException streamsException) {\n   687→   687→                    handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(streamsException, task.id());\n   688→   688→                }\n   689→   689→            }\n   690→   690→        }\n   691→   691→\n   692→   692→        private void requeueTaskForRestoration(final StreamTask task) {\n   693→   693→            updatingTasks.remove(task.id());\n   694→   694→            tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n   695→   695→            try {\n   696→   696→                tasksAndActions.add(TaskAndAction.createAddTask(task));\n   697→   697→                tasksAndActionsCondition.signalAll();\n   698→   698→            } finally {\n   699→   699→                tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n   700→   700→            }\n   701→   701→        }\n   702→   702→\n   703→   703→        private void transitToUpdateStandbysIfOnlyStandbysLeft() {\n   704→   704→            if (onlyStandbyTasksUpdating()) {\n   705→   705→                changelogReader.transitToUpdateStandby();\n   706→   706→            }\n   707→   707→        }\n   708→   708→\n   709→   709→        private void addToRestoredTasks(final StreamTask task) {\n   710→   710→            restoredActiveTasksLock.lock();\n   711→   711→            try {\n   712→   712→                restoredActiveTasks.add(task);\n   713→   713→                updatingTasks.remove(task.id());\n   714→   714→                log.debug(\"Active task \" + task.id() + \" was added to the restored tasks\");\n   715→   715→                restoredActiveTasksCondition.signalAll();\n   716→   716→            } finally {\n   717→   717→                restoredActiveTasksLock.unlock();\n   718→   718→            }\n   719→   719→        }\n   720→   720→\n   721→   721→        private void maybeCheckpointTasks(final long now) {\n   722→   722→            final long elapsedMsSinceLastCommit = now - lastCommitMs;\n   723→   723→            if (elapsedMsSinceLastCommit > commitIntervalMs) {\n   724→   724→                if (log.isDebugEnabled()) {\n   725→   725→                    log.debug(\"Checkpointing state of all restoring tasks since {}ms has elapsed (commit interval is {}ms)\",\n   726→   726→                        elapsedMsSinceLastCommit, commitIntervalMs);\n   727→   727→                }\n   728→   728→\n   729→   729→                measureCheckpointLatency(() -> {\n   730→   730→                    for (final Task task : updatingTasks.values()) {\n   731→   731→                        try {\n   732→   732→                            // do not enforce checkpointing during restoration if its position has not advanced much\n   733→   733→                            task.maybeCheckpoint(false);\n   734→   734→                        } catch (final StreamsException streamsException) {\n   735→   735→                            handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(streamsException, task.id());\n   736→   736→                        }\n   737→   737→                    }\n   738→   738→                });\n   739→   739→\n   740→   740→                lastCommitMs = now;\n   741→   741→            }\n   742→   742→        }\n   743→   743→\n   744→   744→        private void measureCheckpointLatency(final Runnable actionToMeasure) {\n   745→   745→            final long startMs = time.milliseconds();\n   746→   746→            try {\n   747→   747→                actionToMeasure.run();\n   748→   748→            } finally {\n   749→   749→                totalCheckpointLatency += Math.max(0L, time.milliseconds() - startMs);\n   750→   750→            }\n   751→   751→        }\n   752→   752→\n   753→   753→        private void recordMetrics(final long now, final long totalLatency, final long totalWaitLatency) {\n   754→   754→            final long totalRestoreLatency = Math.max(0L, totalLatency - totalWaitLatency - totalCheckpointLatency);\n   755→   755→\n   756→   756→            recordWindowedSum(\n   757→   757→                now,\n   758→   758→                totalWaitLatency,\n   759→   759→                totalCheckpointLatency,\n   760→   760→                totalRestoreLatency * (changelogReader.isRestoringActive() ? 1.0d : 0.0d),\n   761→   761→                totalRestoreLatency * (changelogReader.isRestoringActive() ? 0.0d : 1.0d),\n   762→   762→                totalLatency\n   763→   763→            );\n   764→   764→\n   765→   765→            recordRatios(now);\n   766→   766→\n   767→   767→            totalCheckpointLatency = 0L;\n   768→   768→        }\n   769→   769→\n   770→   770→        private void initTimeWindowIfNeeded(final long now) {\n   771→   771→            if (!timeWindowInitialized) {\n   772→   772→                idleTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n   773→   773→                checkpointTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n   774→   774→                activeRestoreTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n   775→   775→                standbyRestoreTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n   776→   776→                runOnceLatencyWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n   777→   777→                timeWindowInitialized = true;\n   778→   778→            }\n   779→   779→        }\n   780→   780→\n   781→   781→        private void recordWindowedSum(final long now,\n   782→   782→                                       final double idleTime,\n   783→   783→                                       final double checkpointTime,\n   784→   784→                                       final double activeRestoreTime,\n   785→   785→                                       final double standbyRestoreTime,\n   786→   786→                                       final double totalLatency) {\n   787→   787→            idleTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, idleTime, now);\n   788→   788→            checkpointTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, checkpointTime, now);\n   789→   789→            activeRestoreTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, activeRestoreTime, now);\n   790→   790→            standbyRestoreTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, standbyRestoreTime, now);\n   791→   791→            runOnceLatencyWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, totalLatency, now);\n   792→   792→        }\n   793→   793→\n   794→   794→        private void recordRatios(final long now) {\n   795→   795→            final double runOnceLatencyWindow = runOnceLatencyWindowedSum.measure(metricsConfig, now);\n   796→   796→\n   797→   797→            recordRatio(now, runOnceLatencyWindow, idleTimeWindowedSum, updaterMetrics.idleRatioSensor);\n   798→   798→            recordRatio(now, runOnceLatencyWindow, checkpointTimeWindowedSum, updaterMetrics.checkpointRatioSensor);\n   799→   799→            recordRatio(now, runOnceLatencyWindow, activeRestoreTimeWindowedSum, updaterMetrics.activeRestoreRatioSensor);\n   800→   800→            recordRatio(now, runOnceLatencyWindow, standbyRestoreTimeWindowedSum, updaterMetrics.standbyRestoreRatioSensor);\n   801→   801→        }\n   802→   802→\n   803→   803→        private void recordRatio(final long now,\n   804→   804→                                 final double runOnceLatencyWindow,\n   805→   805→                                 final WindowedSum windowedSum,\n   806→   806→                                 final Sensor ratioSensor) {\n   807→   807→            if (runOnceLatencyWindow > 0.0) {\n   808→   808→                final double elapsedTime = windowedSum.measure(metricsConfig, now);\n   809→   809→                ratioSensor.record(elapsedTime / runOnceLatencyWindow, now);\n   810→   810→            } else {\n   811→   811→                ratioSensor.record(0.0, now);\n   812→   812→            }\n   813→   813→        }\n   814→   814→\n   815→   815→    }\n   816→   816→\n   817→   817→    private final Time time;\n   818→   818→    private final Logger log;\n   819→   819→    private final String name;\n   820→   820→    private final StreamsMetricsImpl metrics;\n   821→   821→    private final Consumer<byte[], byte[]> restoreConsumer;\n   822→   822→    private final ChangelogReader changelogReader;\n   823→   823→    private final TopologyMetadata topologyMetadata;\n   824→   824→    private final Queue<TaskAndAction> tasksAndActions = new LinkedList<>();\n   825→   825→    private final Lock tasksAndActionsLock = new ReentrantLock();\n   826→   826→    private final Condition tasksAndActionsCondition = tasksAndActionsLock.newCondition();\n   827→   827→    private final Queue<StreamTask> restoredActiveTasks = new LinkedList<>();\n   828→   828→    private final Lock restoredActiveTasksLock = new ReentrantLock();\n   829→   829→    private final Condition restoredActiveTasksCondition = restoredActiveTasksLock.newCondition();\n   830→   830→    private final Lock exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock = new ReentrantLock();\n   831→   831→    private final Queue<ExceptionAndTask> exceptionsAndFailedTasks = new LinkedList<>();\n   832→   832→    private final BlockingQueue<Task> removedTasks = new LinkedBlockingQueue<>();\n   833→   833→    private final AtomicBoolean isTopologyResumed = new AtomicBoolean(false);\n   834→   834→\n   835→   835→    private final long commitIntervalMs;\n   836→   836→    private long lastCommitMs;\n   837→   837→    private volatile long restorationStartTopologyVersion = -1L;\n   838→   838→\n   839→   839→    private StateUpdaterThread stateUpdaterThread = null;\n   840→   840→\n   841→   841→    public DefaultStateUpdater(final String name,\n   842→   842→                               final StreamsMetricsImpl metrics,\n   843→   843→                               final StreamsConfig config,\n   844→   844→                               final Consumer<byte[], byte[]> restoreConsumer,\n   845→   845→                               final ChangelogReader changelogReader,\n   846→   846→                               final TopologyMetadata topologyMetadata,\n   847→   847→                               final Time time) {\n   848→   848→        this.time = time;\n   849→   849→        this.name = name;\n   850→   850→        this.metrics = metrics;\n   851→   851→        this.restoreConsumer = restoreConsumer;\n   852→   852→        this.changelogReader = changelogReader;\n   853→   853→        this.topologyMetadata = topologyMetadata;\n   854→   854→        this.commitIntervalMs = config.getLong(StreamsConfig.COMMIT_INTERVAL_MS_CONFIG);\n   855→   855→\n   856→   856→        final String logPrefix = String.format(\"state-updater [%s] \", name);\n   857→   857→        final LogContext logContext = new LogContext(logPrefix);\n   858→   858→        this.log = logContext.logger(DefaultStateUpdater.class);\n   859→   859→    }\n   860→   860→\n   861→   861→    public void start() {\n   862→   862→        if (stateUpdaterThread == null) {\n   863→   863→            if (!restoredActiveTasks.isEmpty() || !exceptionsAndFailedTasks.isEmpty()) {\n   864→   864→                throw new IllegalStateException(\"State updater started with non-empty output queues. \"\n   865→   865→                    + BUG_ERROR_MESSAGE);\n   866→   866→            }\n   867→   867→            restorationStartTopologyVersion = topologyMetadata.topologyVersion();\n   868→   868→            stateUpdaterThread = new StateUpdaterThread(name, metrics, changelogReader);\n   869→   869→            stateUpdaterThread.start();\n   870→   870→\n   871→   871→            // initialize the last commit as of now to prevent first commit happens immediately\n   872→   872→            this.lastCommitMs = time.milliseconds();\n   873→   873→        }\n   874→   874→    }\n   875→   875→\n   876→   876→    @Override\n   877→   877→    public void shutdown(final Duration timeout) {\n   878→   878→        if (stateUpdaterThread != null) {\n   879→   879→            log.info(\"Shutting down state updater thread\");\n   880→   880→\n   881→   881→            // first set the running flag and then\n   882→   882→            // notify the condition in case the thread is waiting on it;\n   883→   883→            // note this ordering should not be changed\n   884→   884→            stateUpdaterThread.isRunning.set(false);\n   885→   885→\n   886→   886→            tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n   887→   887→            try {\n   888→   888→                tasksAndActionsCondition.signalAll();\n   889→   889→            } finally {\n   890→   890→                tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n   891→   891→            }\n   892→   892→\n   893→   893→            try {\n   894→   894→                stateUpdaterThread.join(timeout.toMillis());\n   895→   895→                if (stateUpdaterThread.isAlive()) {\n   896→   896→                    throw new StreamsException(\"State updater thread did not shutdown within the timeout\");\n   897→   897→                }\n   898→   898→                stateUpdaterThread = null;\n   899→   899→            } catch (final InterruptedException ignored) {\n   900→   900→            }\n   901→   901→        }\n   902→   902→    }\n   903→   903→\n   904→   904→    @Override\n   905→   905→    public void add(final Task task) {\n   906→   906→        verifyStateFor(task);\n   907→   907→\n   908→   908→        tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n   909→   909→        try {\n   910→   910→            tasksAndActions.add(TaskAndAction.createAddTask(task));\n   911→   911→            tasksAndActionsCondition.signalAll();\n   912→   912→        } finally {\n   913→   913→            tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n   914→   914→        }\n   915→   915→    }\n   916→   916→\n   917→   917→    private void verifyStateFor(final Task task) {\n   918→   918→        if (task.isActive() && task.state() != State.RESTORING) {\n   919→   919→            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Active task \" + task.id() + \" is not in state RESTORING. \" + BUG_ERROR_MESSAGE);\n   920→   920→        }\n   921→   921→        if (!task.isActive() && task.state() != State.RUNNING) {\n   922→   922→            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Standby task \" + task.id() + \" is not in state RUNNING. \" + BUG_ERROR_MESSAGE);\n   923→   923→        }\n   924→   924→    }\n   925→   925→\n   926→   926→    @Override\n   927→   927→    public CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> remove(final TaskId taskId,\n   928→   928→                                                       final StandbyUpdateListener.SuspendReason suspendReason) {\n   929→   929→        final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future = new CompletableFuture<>();\n   930→   930→        tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n   931→   931→        try {\n   932→   932→            tasksAndActions.add(TaskAndAction.createRemoveTask(taskId, future, suspendReason));\n   933→   933→            tasksAndActionsCondition.signalAll();\n   934→   934→        } finally {\n   935→   935→            tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n   936→   936→        }\n   937→   937→        return future;\n   938→   938→    }\n   939→   939→\n   940→   940→    @Override\n   941→   941→    public void signalResume() {\n   942→   942→        tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n   943→   943→        try {\n   944→   944→            isTopologyResumed.set(true);\n   945→   945→            tasksAndActionsCondition.signalAll();\n   946→   946→        } finally {\n   947→   947→            tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n   948→   948→        }\n   949→   949→    }\n   950→   950→\n   951→   951→    @Override\n   952→   952→    public Set<StreamTask> drainRestoredActiveTasks(final Duration timeout) {\n   953→   953→        final long timeoutMs = timeout.toMillis();\n   954→   954→        final long startTime = time.milliseconds();\n   955→   955→        final long deadline = startTime + timeoutMs;\n   956→   956→        long now = startTime;\n   957→   957→        final Set<StreamTask> result = new HashSet<>();\n   958→   958→        try {\n   959→   959→            while (now <= deadline && result.isEmpty()) {\n   960→   960→                restoredActiveTasksLock.lock();\n   961→   961→                try {\n   962→   962→                    while (restoredActiveTasks.isEmpty() && now <= deadline) {\n   963→   963→                        // We can ignore whether the deadline expired during await, as the while loop condition will\n   964→   964→                        // check again for deadline expiration.\n   965→   965→                        @SuppressWarnings(\"UnusedLocalVariable\")\n   966→   966→                        final boolean ignored = restoredActiveTasksCondition.await(deadline - now, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);\n   967→   967→                        now = time.milliseconds();\n   968→   968→                    }\n   969→   969→                    result.addAll(restoredActiveTasks);\n   970→   970→                    restoredActiveTasks.clear();\n   971→   971→                } finally {\n   972→   972→                    restoredActiveTasksLock.unlock();\n   973→   973→                }\n   974→   974→                now = time.milliseconds();\n   975→   975→            }\n   976→   976→            return result;\n   977→   977→        } catch (final InterruptedException ignored) {\n   978→   978→        }\n   979→   979→        return result;\n   980→   980→    }\n   981→   981→\n   982→   982→    @Override\n   983→   983→    public List<ExceptionAndTask> drainExceptionsAndFailedTasks() {\n   984→   984→        final List<ExceptionAndTask> result = new ArrayList<>();\n   985→   985→        exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.lock();\n   986→   986→        try {\n   987→   987→            result.addAll(exceptionsAndFailedTasks);\n   988→   988→            exceptionsAndFailedTasks.clear();\n   989→   989→        } finally {\n   990→   990→            exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.unlock();\n   991→   991→        }\n   992→   992→        return result;\n   993→   993→    }\n   994→   994→\n   995→   995→    @Override\n   996→   996→    public boolean hasExceptionsAndFailedTasks() {\n   997→   997→        exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.lock();\n   998→   998→        try {\n   999→   999→            return !exceptionsAndFailedTasks.isEmpty();\n  1000→  1000→        } finally {\n  1001→  1001→            exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.unlock();\n  1002→  1002→        }\n  1003→  1003→    }\n  1004→  1004→\n  1005→  1005→    public Set<StandbyTask> updatingStandbyTasks() {\n  1006→  1006→        return stateUpdaterThread != null\n  1007→  1007→            ?        }\n   543→        }\n   544→\n   545→        private boolean removeUpdatingTask(final TaskId taskId,\n   546→                                           final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future,\n   547→                                           final StandbyUpdateListener.SuspendReason suspendReason) {\n   548→            if changelogReader.unregister(changelogPartitions, suspendReason);\n   568→        }\n   569→\n   570→        private boolean removePausedTask(final TaskId taskId,\n   571→                                         final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future,\n   572→                                         final StandbyUpdateListener.SuspendReason suspendReason) {\n   573→            if final Collection<TopicPartition> changelogPartitions = task.changelogPartitions();\n   588→            changelogReader.unregister(changelogPartitions, suspendReason);\n   589→        }\n   590→\n   591→        private boolean removeRestoredTask(final TaskId taskId, final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future) {\n   592→            restoredActiveTasksLock.lock();\n   593→            try {\n   594→                final Iterator<StreamTask> iterator = restoredActiveTasks.iterator();\n   595→                while (iterator.hasNext()) {\n   596→                    final StreamTask TaskId taskId, final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future) {\n   612→            exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.lock();\n   613→            try {\n   614→                final         }\n   625→                }\n   626→                return false;\n   627→            } finally {\n   628→                exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.unlock();\n   629→            }\n   630→        }\n   631→\n   632→        private void pauseTask(final Task task) {\n   633→            final TaskId taskId = task.id();\n   634→            // do not need to unregister changelog partitions for paused tasks\n   635→            try {\n   636→                measureCheckpointLatency(() -> task.maybeCheckpoint(true));\n   637→                pausedTasks.put(taskId, task);\n   638→                updatingTasks.remove(taskId);\n   639→                if (task.isActive()) {\n   640→                    transitToUpdateStandbysIfOnlyStandbysLeft();\n   641→                }\n   642→                log.info((task.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\")\n   643→                    + \" task \" + task.id() + \" was paused from the updating tasks and added to the paused tasks.\");\n   644→\n   645→            } catch (final StreamsException streamsException) {\n   646→                handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(streamsException, taskId);\n   647→            }\n   648→        }\n   649→\n   650→        private void resumeTask(final Task task) {\n   651→            final TaskId taskId = task.id();\n   652→            updatingTasks.put(taskId, task);\n   653→            pausedTasks.remove(taskId);\n   654→\n   655→            if (task.isActive()) {\n   656→                log.info(\"Stateful active task \" + task.id() + \" was resumed to the updating tasks of the state updater\");\n   657→                changelogReader.enforceRestoreActive();\n   658→            } else {\n   659→                log.info(\"Standby task \" + task.id() + \" was resumed to the updating tasks of the state updater\");\n   660→                if (updatingTasks.size() == 1) {\n   661→                    changelogReader.transitToUpdateStandby();\n   662→                }\n   663→            }\n   664→        }\n   665→\n   666→        private boolean isStateless(final Task task) {\n   667→            return task.changelogPartitions().isEmpty() && task.isActive();\n   668→        }\n   669→\n   670→        private void maybeCompleteRestoration(final StreamTask task,\n   671→                                              final Set<TopicPartition> restoredChangelogs) {\n   672→            final Collection<TopicPartition> changelogPartitions = task.changelogPartitions();\n   673→            if (restoredChangelogs.containsAll(changelogPartitions)) {\n   674→ restoration\");\n   685→                    transitToUpdateStandbysIfOnlyStandbysLeft();\n   686→                } catch (final StreamsException streamsException) {\n   687→                    handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(streamsException, task.id());\n   688→                }\n   689→            }\n   690→        }\n   691→\n   692→        private void requeueTaskForRestoration(final StreamTask task) {\n   693→            updatingTasks.remove(task.id());\n   694→            tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n   695→            try {\n   696→                tasksAndActions.add(TaskAndAction.createAddTask(task));\n   697→                tasksAndActionsCondition.signalAll();\n   698→            } finally {\n   699→                tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n   700→            }\n   701→        }\n   702→\n   703→        private void transitToUpdateStandbysIfOnlyStandbysLeft() {\n   704→            if (onlyStandbyTasksUpdating()) {\n   705→                changelogReader.transitToUpdateStandby();\n   706→            }\n   707→        }\n   708→\n   709→        private void addToRestoredTasks(final StreamTask task) {\n   710→            restoredActiveTasksLock.lock();\n   711→            try {\n   712→                restoredActiveTasks.add(task);\n   713→ restoredActiveTasksCondition.signalAll();\n   716→            } finally {\n   717→                restoredActiveTasksLock.unlock();\n   718→            }\n   719→        }\n   720→\n   721→        private void maybeCheckpointTasks(final long now) {\n   722→            final long elapsedMsSinceLastCommit = now - lastCommitMs;\n   723→            if (elapsedMsSinceLastCommit > commitIntervalMs) {\n   724→                if (log.isDebugEnabled()) {\n   725→                    log.debug(\"Checkpointing state of all restoring tasks since {}ms has elapsed (commit interval is {}ms)\",\n   726→                        elapsedMsSinceLastCommit, commitIntervalMs);\n   727→                }\n   728→\n   729→                measureCheckpointLatency(() -> {\n   730→                    for (final Task task : updatingTasks.values()) {\n   731→                        try {\n   732→                            // do not enforce checkpointing during restoration if its position has not advanced much\n   733→                            task.maybeCheckpoint(false);\n   734→                        } catch (final StreamsException streamsException) {\n   735→                            handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(streamsException, task.id());\n   736→                        }\n   737→                    }\n   738→                });\n   739→\n   740→                lastCommitMs = now;\n   741→            }\n   742→        }\n   743→\n   744→        private void measureCheckpointLatency(final Runnable actionToMeasure) {\n   745→            final long startMs = time.milliseconds();\n   746→            try {\n   747→                actionToMeasure.run();\n   748→            } finally {\n   749→                totalCheckpointLatency += Math.max(0L, time.milliseconds() - startMs);\n   750→            }\n   751→        }\n   752→\n   753→        private void recordMetrics(final long now, final long totalLatency, final long totalWaitLatency) {\n   754→            final long totalRestoreLatency = Math.max(0L, totalLatency - totalWaitLatency - totalCheckpointLatency);\n   755→\n   756→            recordWindowedSum(\n   757→                now,\n   758→                totalWaitLatency,\n   759→                totalCheckpointLatency,\n   760→                totalRestoreLatency * (changelogReader.isRestoringActive() ? 1.0d : 0.0d),\n   761→                totalRestoreLatency * (changelogReader.isRestoringActive() ? 0.0d : 1.0d),\n   762→                totalLatency\n   763→            );\n   764→\n   765→            recordRatios(now);\n   766→\n   767→            totalCheckpointLatency = 0L;\n   768→        }\n   769→\n   770→        private void initTimeWindowIfNeeded(final long now) {\n   771→            if (!timeWindowInitialized) {\n   772→                idleTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n   773→                checkpointTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n   774→                activeRestoreTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n   775→                standbyRestoreTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n   776→                runOnceLatencyWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n   777→                timeWindowInitialized = true;\n   778→            }\n   779→        }\n   780→\n   781→        private void recordWindowedSum(final long now,\n   782→                                       final double idleTime,\n   783→                                       final double checkpointTime,\n   784→                                       final double activeRestoreTime,\n   785→                                       final double standbyRestoreTime,\n   786→                                       final double    activeRestoreTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, activeRestoreTime, now);\n   790→            standbyRestoreTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, standbyRestoreTime, now);\n   791→            runOnceLatencyWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, totalLatency, now);\n   792→        }\n   793→\n   794→        private void recordRatios(final long now) {\n   795→            final double runOnceLatencyWindow = runOnceLatencyWindowedSum.measure(metricsConfig, now);\n   796→\n   797→            recordRatio(now, runOnceLatencyWindow, idleTimeWindowedSum, updaterMetrics.idleRatioSensor);\n   798→            recordRatio(now, runOnceLatencyWindow, checkpointTimeWindowedSum, updaterMetrics.checkpointRatioSensor);\n   799→            recordRatio(now, runOnceLatencyWindow, activeRestoreTimeWindowedSum, updaterMetrics.activeRestoreRatioSensor);\n   800→            recordRatio(now, runOnceLatencyWindow, standbyRestoreTimeWindowedSum, updaterMetrics.standbyRestoreRatioSensor);\n   801→        }\n   802→\n   803→        private void recordRatio(final long now,\n   804→                                 final double runOnceLatencyWindow,\n   805→                                 final WindowedSum windowedSum,\n   806→                                 final Sensor ratioSensor) {\n   807→            if (runOnceLatencyWindow > 0.0) {\n   808→                final double elapsedTime = windowedSum.measure(metricsConfig, now);\n   809→                ratioSensor.record(elapsedTime / runOnceLatencyWindow, now);\n   810→            } else {\n   811→                ratioSensor.record(0.0, now);\n   812→            }\n   813→        }\n   814→\n   815→    }\n   816→\n   817→ started with non-empty output queues. \"\n   865→                    + BUG_ERROR_MESSAGE);\n   866→            }\n   867→            restorationStartTopologyVersion =          // initialize the last commit as of now to prevent first commit happens immediately\n   872→            this.lastCommitMs = time.milliseconds();\n   873→        }\n   874→    }\n   875→\n   876→    @Override\n   877→    public void shutdown(final Duration timeout) {\n   878→        if (stateUpdaterThread != null) {\n   879→            log.info(\"Shutting down state updater thread\");\n   880→\n   881→            // first set the running flag and then\n   882→            // notify the condition in case the thread is waiting on it;\n   883→            // note this ordering should not be changed\n   884→            stateUpdaterThread.isRunning.set(false);\n   885→\n   886→            tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n   887→            try {\n   888→                tasksAndActionsCondition.signalAll();\n   889→            } finally {\n   890→                tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n   891→            }\n   892→\n   893→            try {\n   894→                stateUpdaterThread.join(timeout.toMillis());\n   895→                if (stateUpdaterThread.isAlive()) {\n   896→                    throw new StreamsException(\"State updater thread did not shutdown within the timeout\");\n   897→                }\n   898→                stateUpdaterThread = null;\n   899→            } catch (final InterruptedException ignored) {\n   900→            }\n   901→        }\n   902→    }\n   903→\n   904→    @Override\n   905→    public void add(final Task task) {\n   906→        verifyStateFor(task);\n   907→\n   908→        tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n   914→        }\n   915→    }\n   916→\n   917→    private void verifyStateFor(final Task task) {\n   918→        if (task.isActive() && task.state() != State.RESTORING) {\n   919→            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Active task \" + task.id() + \" is not in state RESTORING. \" + BUG_ERROR_MESSAGE);\n   920→        }\n   921→        if @SuppressWarnings(\"rawtypes\")\n    82→    private final Map<Class, CacheQueryHandler> queryHandlers =\n    83→        mkMap(\n    84→            mkEntry(\n    85→                KeyQuery.class,\n    86→                (query, mergedPosition, positionBound, config, store) ->\n    87→                    runKeyQuery(query, mergedPosition, positionBound, config)\n    88→            )\n    89→ StateStore root) {\n   100→        internalContext = asInternalProcessorContext(stateStoreContext);\n   101→        cacheName = ThreadCache.nameSpaceFromTaskIdAndStore(internalContext.taskId().toString(), name());\n   102→        internalContext.registerCacheFlushListener(cacheName, entries -> {\n   103→            for (final     }\n   123→        }\n   124→        return mergedPosition;\n   125→    }\n   126→\n   127→    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n   128→    @Override\n   129→    public <R> QueryResult<R> positionBound,\n   160→                        config,\n   161→                        this\n   162→                    );\n   163→                }\n   164→            } finally {\n   165→                lock.unlock();\n   166→            }\n   167→        }\n   168→        if (config.isCollectExecutionInfo()) {\n   169→            result.addExecutionInfo(\n   170→                \"Handled in \" + <R> QueryResult<R> runKeyQuery(final Query<R> query,\n   177→                                           final Position mergedPosition,\n   178→                                           final PositionBound positionBound,\n   179→                                           final QueryConfig config) {\n   180→        if (cacheType == CacheType.TIMESTAMPED_KEY_VALUE_STORE_WITH_HEADERS) {\n   181→            throw new UnsupportedOperationException(\"Queries (IQv2) are not supported for timestamped key-value stores with headers yet.\");\n   182→        }\n   183→        QueryResult<R> result = null;\n   184→        final KeyQuery<Bytes, byte[]> keyQuery = (KeyQuery<Bytes, byte[]>) query;\n   185→\n   186→        if (keyQuery.isSkipCache()) {\n   187→            return wrapped().query(query, positionBound, config);\n   188→        }\n   189→\n   190→        final Bytes key = keyQuery.getKey();\n   191→\n   192→        synchronized (mergedPosition) {\n   193→            if (internalContext.cache() != null) {\n   194→                final LRUCacheEntry lruCacheEntry = internalContext.cache().get(cacheName, key);\n   195→                if (lruCacheEntry != null) {\n   196→                    final byte[] rawValue;\n   197→                    if (cacheType == CacheType.TIMESTAMPED_KEY_VALUE_STORE && !WrappedStateStore.isTimestamped(wrapped()) && !StoreQueryUtils.isAdapter(wrapped())) {\n   198→                        rawValue = ValueAndTimestampDeserializer.rawValue(lruCacheEntry.value());\n   199→                    } else {\n   200→                        rawValue = lruCacheEntry.value();\n   201→                    }\n   202→                    result = (QueryResult<R>) QueryResult.forResult(rawValue);\n   203→                }\n   204→            }\n   205→\n   206→            // We don't need to check the position at the state store since we already performed the check on\n   207→            // the merged position above\n   208→ 217→                                    final InternalProcessorContext<?, ?> context) {\n   218→        if (flushListener != null) {\n   219→            final byte[] rawNewValue = entry.newValue();\n   220→            final byte[] rawOldValue = rawNewValue == null || sendOldValues ? wrapped().get(entry.key()) : null;\n   221→\n   222→            // this is an optimization: if this key did not exist in underlying store and also not in the cache,\n   223→            // we can skip flushing to downstream as well as writing to underlying store\n   224→            if (rawNewValue != null || rawOldValue != null) {\n   225→                // we need to get the old values if needed, and then put to store, and then flush\n   226→                final ProcessorRecordContext current = context.recordContext();\n   227→                try {\n   228→                    context.setRecordContext(entry.entry().context());\n   229→                    wrapped().put(entry.key(), entry.newValue());\n   230→                    flushListener.apply(\n   231→                        new Record<>(\n   232→                            entry.key().get(),\n   233→                            new Change<>(rawNewValue, sendOldValues ? rawOldValue : null),\n   234→                            entry.entry().context().timestamp(),\n   235→                            entry.entry().context().headers()));\n   236→                } finally {\n   237→                    context.setRecordContext(current);\n   238→                }\n   239→            }\n   240→        } else {\n   241→            final ProcessorRecordContext current = context.recordContext();\n   242→            try {\n   243→                context.setRecordContext(entry.entry().context());\n   244→                wrapped().put(entry.key(), entry.newValue());\n   245→            } finally {\n   246→                context.setRecordContext(current);\n   247→            }\n   248→        }\n   249→    }\n   250→\n   251→    @Override\n   252→    public boolean setFlushListener(final CacheFlushListener<byte[], byte[]> flushListener,\n   253→                                    final boolean @Override\n   261→    public void put(final Bytes key,\n   262→                    final byte[] value) {\n   263→        Objects.requireNonNull(key, \"key cannot be null\");\n   264→ private void putInternal(final Bytes key,\n   276→                             final byte[] value) {\n   277→        synchronized (position) {\n   278→            internalContext.cache().put(\n   279→ 138→\n   139→    // Need to (re)set the log here to pick up the `processId` part of the clientId in the prefix\n   140→    public void setLog(final LogContext logContext) {\n   141→        log = public TaskExecutionMetadata taskExecutionMetadata() {\n   178→        return taskExecutionMetadata;\n   179→    }\n   180→\n   181→    public void executeTopologyUpdatesAndBumpThreadVersion(final       handleTopologyRemovals.accept(namedTopologiesView());\n   188→            threadVersions.put(Thread.currentThread().getName(), latestTopologyVersion);\n   189→        } finally {\n   190→            version.topologyLock.unlock();\n   191→        }\n   192→    }\n   193→\n   194→    public void maybeNotifyTopologyVersionListeners() {\n   195→        try {\n   196→            lock();\n   197→            final long minThreadVersion = minimumThreadVersion();\n   198→            final Iterator<TopologyVersionListener> iterator = version.activeTopologyUpdateListeners.listIterator();\n   199→            TopologyVersionListener topologyVersionListener;\n   200→            while (iterator.hasNext()) {\n   201→                topologyVersionListener = iterator.next();\n   202→ topologyVersionListener.future.complete(null);\n   205→                    iterator.remove();\n   206→                    log.info(\"All threads are now on topology version {}\", topologyVersionListener.topologyVersion);\n   207→                }\n   208→            }\n   209→        } finally {\n   210→            unlock();\n   211→        }\n   212→    }\n   213→\n   214→    // Return the minimum version across all live threads, or Long.MAX_VALUE if there are no threads running\n   215→    private long minimumThreadVersion() {\n   216→        final Optional<Long> minVersion = threadVersions.values().stream().min(Long::compare);\n   217→        return minVersion.orElse(Long.MAX_VALUE);\n   218→    }\n   219→\n   220→    public void wakeupThreads() {\n   221→        try {\n   222→            lock();\n   223→            version.topologyCV.signalAll();\n   224→        } finally {\n   225→            unlock();\n   226→        }\n   227→    }\n   228→\n   229→    public void registerLifecycleObserver(final TopologyLifecycleObserver observer) {\n   230→        lock();\n   231→        try {\n   232→            lifecycleObservers.add(observer);\n   233→        } finally {\n   234→            unlock();\n   235→        }\n   236→    }\n   237→\n   238→    private void notifyLifecycleObservers() {\n   239→        final long currentVersion = version.topologyVersion.get();\n   240→        final Set<String> activeTopologies = namedTopologiesView();\n   241→        for (final TopologyLifecycleObserver observer : lifecycleObservers) {\n   242→            try {\n   243→                observer.onTopologyChange(currentVersion, activeTopologies);\n   244→            } catch (final Exception e) {\n   245→                log.warn(\"Topology lifecycle observer threw exception\", e);\n   246→            }\n   247→        }\n   248→    }\n   249→\n   250→    public boolean isTaskTopologyStale(final TaskId taskId) {\n   251→        lock();\n   252→        try {\n   253→            final String topologyName = taskId.topologyName();\n   254→            if (topologyName != null) {\n   255→                return !builders.containsKey(topologyName);\n   256→            }\n   257→            return false;\n   258→        } finally {\n   259→            unlock();\n   260→        }\n   261→    }\n   262→\n   263→    public void maybeWaitForNonEmptyTopology(final Supplier<StreamThread.State> threadState) {\n   264→        if (isEmpty() && threadState.get().isAlive()) {\n   265→            try {\n   266→                lock();\n   267→                while (isEmpty() && threadState.get().isAlive()) {\n   268→                    try {\n   269→                        log.debug(\"Detected that the topology is currently empty, waiting for something to process\");\n   270→                        version.topologyCV.await();\n   271→                    } catch (final InterruptedException e) {\n   272→                        log.error(\"StreamThread was interrupted while waiting on empty topology\", e);\n   273→                    }\n   274→                }\n   275→            } finally {\n   276→                unlock();\n   277→            }\n   278→        }\n   279→    }\n   280→\n   281→    /**\n   282→     * Adds the topology and registers a future that listens for all threads on the older version to see the update\n   283→     */\n   284→    public void registerAndBuildNewTopology(final KafkaFutureImpl<Void> future, final InternalTopologyBuilder newTopologyBuilder) {\n   285→        try {\n   286→            lock();\n   287→            buildAndVerifyTopology(newTopologyBuilder);\n   288→            log.info(\"New NamedTopology {} passed validation and will be added, old topology version is {}\", newTopologyBuilder.topologyName(), version.topologyVersion.get());\n   289→            version.topologyVersion.incrementAndGet();\n   290→            version.activeTopologyUpdateListeners.add(new TopologyVersionListener(topologyVersion(), future));\n   291→            builders.put(newTopologyBuilder.topologyName(), newTopologyBuilder);\n   292→            wakeupThreads();\n   293→            notifyLifecycleObservers();\n   294→            log.info(\"Added NamedTopology {} and updated topology version to {}\", newTopologyBuilder.topologyName(), version.topologyVersion.get());\n   295→        } catch (final Throwable throwable) {\n   296→            log.error(\"Failed to add NamedTopology {}, please retry the operation.\", newTopologyBuilder.topologyName());\n   297→            future.completeExceptionally(throwable);\n   298→        } finally {\n   299→            unlock();\n   300→        }\n   301→    }\n   302→\n   303→    /**\n   304→     * Pauses a topology by name\n   305→     * @param topologyName Name of the topology to pause\n   306→     */\n   307→    public void pauseTopology(final String topologyName) {\n   308→        pausedTopologies.add(topologyName);\n   309→    }\n   310→\n   311→    /**\n   312→     * Checks if a given topology is paused.\n   313→     * @param topologyName If null, assume 327→\n   328→    /**\n   329→     * Removes the topology and registers a future that listens for all threads on the older version to see the update\n   330→     */\n   331→    public KafkaFuture<Void> unregisterTopology(final KafkaFutureImpl<Void> removeTopologyFuture,\n   332→                                                final String topologyName) {\n   333→        try {\n   334→            lock();\n   335→            log.info(\"Beginning removal of NamedTopology {}, old topology version is {}\", topologyName, version.topologyVersion.get());\n   336→            version.topologyVersion.incrementAndGet();\n   337→            version.activeTopologyUpdateListeners.add(new TopologyVersionListener(topologyVersion(), removeTopologyFuture));\n   338→            final InternalTopologyBuilder removedBuilder = builders.remove(topologyName);\n   339→            removedBuilder.fullSourceTopicNames().forEach(allInputTopics::remove);\n   340→            removedBuilder.allSourcePatternStrings().forEach(allInputTopics::remove);\n   341→            notifyLifecycleObservers();\n   342→            log.info(\"Finished removing NamedTopology {}, topology version was updated to {}\", topologyName, version.topologyVersion.get());\n   343→        } catch (final Throwable throwable) {\n   344→            log.error(\"Failed to remove NamedTopology {}, please retry.\", topologyName);\n   345→            removeTopologyFuture.completeExceptionally(throwable);\n   346→        } finally {\n   347→            unlock();\n   348→        }\n   349→        return removeTopologyFuture;\n   350→    }\n   351→\n   352→    public TaskConfig taskConfig(final TaskId taskId) {\n   353→        final InternalTopologyBuilder builder = lookupBuilderForTask(taskId);\n   354→        return builder.topologyConfigs().getTaskConfig();\n   355→    }\n   356→\n   357→    public void buildAndRewriteTopology() {\n   358→        applyToEachBuilder(this::buildAndVerifyTopology);\n   359→    }\n   360→\n   361→    private void buildAndVerifyTopology(final InternalTopologyBuilder builder) {\n   362→        builder.rewriteTopology(config);\n   363→        builder.buildTopology();\n   364→\n   365→        final Set<String> allInputTopicsCopy = new HashSet<>(allInputTopics);\n   366→\n   367→        // As we go, check each topology for overlap in the set of input topics/patterns\n   368→        final int numInputTopics = allInputTopicsCopy.size();\n   369→        final List<String> inputTopics = builder.fullSourceTopicNames();\n   370→        final Collection<String> inputPatterns = builder.allSourcePatternStrings();\n   371→\n   372→        final Set<String> newInputTopics = new HashSet<>(inputTopics);\n   373→        newInputTopics.addAll(inputPatterns);\n   374→\n   375→        final int numNewInputTopics = newInputTopics.size();\n   376→        allInputTopicsCopy.addAll(newInputTopics);\n   377→\n   378→        if (allInputTopicsCopy.size() != numInputTopics + numNewInputTopics) {\n   379→            inputTopics.retainAll(allInputTopicsCopy);\n   380→            inputPatterns.retainAll(allInputTopicsCopy);\n   381→            log.error(\"Tried to add the NamedTopology {} but it had overlap with other input topics {} or patterns {}\",\n   382→                      builder.topologyName(), inputTopics, inputPatterns);\n   383→            throw new TopologyException(\"Named Topologies may not subscribe to the same input topics or patterns\");\n   384→        }\n   385→\n   386→        final ProcessorTopology globalTopology = builder.buildGlobalStateTopology();\n   387→        if (globalTopology != null) {\n   388→            if (builder.topologyName() != null) {\n   389→                throw new IllegalStateException(\"Global state stores are not supported with Named Topologies\");\n   390→            } else if (this.globalTopology != null) {\n   391→                throw new TopologyException(\"Topology builder had global state, but global topology has already been set\");\n   392→            } else {\n   393→                this.globalTopology = globalTopology;\n   394→                globalStateStores.putAll(builder.globalStateStores());\n   395→            }\n   396→        }\n   397→        allInputTopics.addAll(newInputTopics);\n   398→    }\n   399→\n   400→    public int numStreamThreads(final StreamsConfig config) {\n   401→        final int configuredNumStreamThreads = config.getInt(StreamsConfig.NUM_STREAM_THREADS_CONFIG);\n   402→\n   403→        // If there are named topologies but some are empty, this indicates a bug in user code\n   404→        if (hasNamedTopologies()) {\n   405→            if (hasNoLocalTopology()) {\n   406→                log.error(\"Detected a named topology with no input topics, a named topology may not be empty.\");\n   407→                throw new TopologyException(\"Topology has no stream threads and no global threads, \" +\n   408→                                                \"must subscribe to at least one source topic or pattern.\");\n   409→            }\n   410→        } else {\n   411→            // If both the global and non-global topologies are empty, this indicates a bug in user code\n   412→            if (hasNoLocalTopology() && !hasGlobalTopology()) {\n   413→                log.error(\"Topology with no input topics will create no stream threads and no global thread.\");\n   414→                throw new TopologyException(\"Topology has no stream threads and no global threads, \" +\n   415→                                                \"must subscribe to at least one source topic or global table.\");\n   416→            }\n   417→        }\n   418→\n   419→        // Lastly we check for an empty non-global topology and override the threads to zero if set otherwise\n   420→        if (configuredNumStreamThreads != 0 && hasNoLocalTopology()) {\n   421→            log.info(\"Overriding number of StreamThreads to zero for global-only topology\");\n   422→            return 0;\n   423→        }\n   424→\n   425→        return configuredNumStreamThreads;\n   426→    }\n   427→\n   428→    /**\n   429→     * @return true iff the app is using named topologies, or was started up with no topology at all\n   430→     */\n   431→    public boolean hasNamedTopologies() {\n   432→        return !builders.containsKey(UNNAMED_TOPOLOGY);\n   433→    }\n   434→\n   435→    public Set<String> namedTopologiesView() {\n   436→        return hasNamedTopologies() ? named topologies, there may not be any persistent state when it first starts up\n   455→        // but a new NamedTopology may introduce it later, so we must return true\n   456→        if
